# Opik

> **Stub — not yet written.** Flesh out as usage patterns reveal opinions worth capturing.

## When to use

- Project needs LLM-specific tracing (prompt, completion, token counts) and an eval harness.

## When NOT to use

- General-purpose observability — see `observability-opentelemetry.md`.
- Error tracking only — see `observability-sentry.md`.
